issues.description: Missing required condition: LeaderIsName (Portgas.D.Ace). The card text explicitly states 'If your Leader is [Portgas.D.Ace]', which must be enforced as a condition.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect searches through 5 cards from top of deck (not full deck), reveals up to 1 Event, adds it to hand, then places rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL does not specify the 5-card limit or the bottom-placement mechanic for remaining cards.
